releases.author: raeperd
releases.description:
## Changes

Addresses review comments from obsidianmd/obsidian-releases#7563

- Remove empty `fundingUrl` from manifest.json
- Replace `FuzzySuggestModal` with `AbstractInputSuggest` for better UX with type-ahead file suggestions
- Use `Vault.process()` instead of `Vault.read()` + `Vault.modify()` for atomic file operations
- Add `styles.css` for plugin release requirements

## Improvements

- Better user experience with inline type-ahead template selection
- More robust file operations following Obsidian best practices
- Prevents race conditions with atomic file modifications

releases.author: raeperd
releases.description:
Plugin submission release

- Changed plugin ID from obsidian-default-template to default-template
- Remove 'obsidian' prefix per submission guidelines
- All functionality remains the same

releases.author: raeperd
releases.description:
🎉 **First release of Default Template Plugin**

**What it does:**
Automatically applies your chosen template to every new note in Obsidian.

**Features:**
- ✅ Set once, forget forever - Choose any template file, never manually insert again
- ✅ Works everywhere - Ctrl+N, clicking non-existent links, any note creation method  
- ✅ Template variables - Processes `{{date}}`, `{{time}}`, `{{title}}`
- ✅ Zero interference - No template selected? Plugin does nothing

**Installation:**

**📁 Easy Way: Download ZIP**
1. Download `obsidian-default-template-v1.0.0.zip` below
2. Extract to `VaultFolder/.obsidian/plugins/`
3. Restart Obsidian → Settings → Community Plugins → Enable

**📄 Manual Way: Individual Files**
1. Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, `styles.css` below  
2. Create folder `VaultFolder/.obsidian/plugins/obsidian-default-template/`
3. Copy all 3 files into the folder
4. Restart Obsidian → Settings → Community Plugins → Enable

**Quick Start:**
1. Enable the plugin in Settings → Community Plugins
2. Go to plugin settings → click "Select template"
3. Choose any `.md` file from your vault  
4. Done! Every new note gets your template automatically

This solves a 3+ year old user request for automatic template application in Obsidian.
releases.name: v1.0.0 - Initial Release
